text: I've been a bit tired and anxious about it, wanted to get checked.
label: non-infectious

text: I'm mostly fine, just wanted to rule anything out.
label: non-infectious

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 1 day(s) ago, and there's no sign of improvement.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm probably fine, but I've been feeling off and wanted to be sure.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now, and it feels like it might be turning a corner.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 9 day(s) of this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 3 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, though I notice it's not improving.
label: influenza/mild

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 6 day(s) and barely functioning. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 5 day(s) like this. I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 6 day(s), and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 8 day(s) in, and it feels like it might be turning a corner.
label: influenza/mild

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 9 day(s) like this, and it feels like it might be turning a corner. I'm burning up.

text: I couldn't sleep worrying about how I've been feeling lately.
